projects.name: pinball-experience
projects.description:
I/O Pinball–inspired game. Iterate from legacy v3.0 to target (Requirements.md + design).
Phases: 0 (baseline v3.0-equiv) → 1 (tests) → 2 (feature steps to target).
Plan: workspace/implementation/pinball-experience/plan/

projects.name: snake-game-v2
projects.description: 基于Godot的新版贪食蛇游戏

requirements.title: 0.1 Primitive playable (launcher + flippers)
requirements.description: Main scene: launcher, flippers, ball. Input: launch, flip. Physics: gravity, bounce. Ref: BASELINE-STEPS 0.1
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Game runs; ball launches and bounces on flippers.

requirements.title: 0.2 Drain
requirements.description: Drain area; ball contact removes ball. Round-lost when no balls. Ref: BASELINE-STEPS 0.2
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Ball drains → removed; round_lost fires.

requirements.title: 0.3 Walls and boundaries
requirements.description: Static bodies around playfield; ball confined. Ref: BASELINE-STEPS 0.3
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Ball bounces off walls; only drain loses ball.

requirements.title: 0.4 Obstacles / bumpers (basic scoring)
requirements.description: Generic reusable scoring component; configurable points. roundScore, add_score. Ref: BASELINE-STEPS 0.4
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Hit obstacle → roundScore increases; score visible.

requirements.title: 0.5 Rounds and game over
requirements.description: roundScore, totalScore, multiplier, rounds(3), status, bonusHistory. Round lost logic. Ref: BASELINE-STEPS 0.5
requirements.acceptance_criteria: 3 drains → game_over; replay restarts.

requirements.title: 0.6 Skill shot
requirements.description: Skill shot target: active 2-3s after launch; 1M points. Ref: BASELINE-STEPS 0.6
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Hit in window → +1M; after window → no bonus.

requirements.title: 0.7 Multiplier
requirements.description: Multiplier 1-6; pluggable trigger (5 hits = +1); reset on round lost. Ref: BASELINE-STEPS 0.7
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Multiplier increases/resets; totalScore includes multiplier.

requirements.title: 0.8 Multiball
requirements.description: spawn_bonus_ball(position, impulse); multiple balls; round_lost when all drain. Ref: BASELINE-STEPS 0.8
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Trigger multiball → ball count > 1; drain all → round_lost.

requirements.title: 0.9 Combo (optional)
requirements.description: Consecutive hits in time window; combo affects score. v3.0 parity. Ref: BASELINE-STEPS 0.9
requirements.acceptance_criteria: N hits in window → combo=N; timeout → combo=0.

requirements.title: 0.10 Polish (physics, animation, audio)
requirements.description: Flipper physics, score popups, audio (bumper, drain, launch, flipper, skill shot, multiball, combo). Ref: BASELINE-STEPS 0.10
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Physics/audio/animation aligned with v3.0.

requirements.title: 1.1 Test suite for baseline
requirements.description: Unit/integration tests: round_lost, scoring, multiplier, bonus ball. CI or local. Ref: ITERATION-PLAN Phase 1
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Tests run; coverage of game state, drain, skill shot, multiplier, multiball.

requirements.title: 2.1 Start flow: initial → play
requirements.description: Initial screen (main menu) with Play; Play loads playfield and starts game. Replay after game over. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.1
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Press Play → playfield loads, ball spawns; Replay → new game.

requirements.title: 2.2 Game state and scoring (requirements shape)
requirements.description: State: roundScore, totalScore, multiplier (1-6), rounds (3), bonusHistory, status. Round lost logic; score cap 9999999999. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.2
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Round lost → totalScore += roundScore×multiplier; rounds decrement; gameOver at 0.

requirements.title: 2.3 Point values and skill shot (I/O values)
requirements.description: Point values 5k, 20k, 200k, 1M. Skill shot 1,000,000. Rollovers/kicker/signpost 5,000. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.3
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Hit skill shot → +1M; hit 5k target → +5k.

requirements.title: 2.4 Character selection
requirements.description: Character selection: four themes (Sparky, Dino, Dash, Android); flow: Initial → Play → Character select → How to Play. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.4
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Play → Character select; choose theme → selection stored; ball/leaderboard match theme.

requirements.title: 2.5 How to Play screen
requirements.description: How to Play screen after character select; dismiss → start game. Replay returns to character select. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.5
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Character selected → How to Play shown; dismiss → game starts; Replay → Character select.

requirements.title: 2.6 HUD (score, multiplier, rounds)
requirements.description: HUD when playing: score, multiplier (1-6), rounds. Overlays: Play, Replay; optional mobile controls. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.6
requirements.acceptance_criteria: HUD shows score, multiplier, rounds; Replay after game over.

requirements.title: 2.7 Camera (waiting / playing / game over)
requirements.description: Camera focus/zoom: waiting → top; playing → playfield; game over → top. Tween on transition. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.7
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Status waiting → camera at top; playing → playfield; game over → top.

requirements.title: 2.8 Google rollovers (5k each)
requirements.description: Google rollovers left and right; ball enters → 5,000 points each. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.8
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Ball enters left/right rollover → +5k each.

requirements.title: 2.9 Google Word letters and spell Google
requirements.description: Google Word letters (6); each lit on hit; when all lit → googleWord bonus. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.9
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Light all letters → googleWord in bonusHistory.

requirements.title: 2.10 Bonus ball (5s) from Google Word / Dash Nest
requirements.description: googleWord or dashNest → 5s timer → spawn one bonus ball at DinoWalls. Multiball indicators animate. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.10
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Trigger googleWord/dashNest → after 5s bonus ball spawns at DinoWalls.

requirements.title: 2.11 Multiball indicators (4)
requirements.description: Four multiball indicators on playfield; light/animate when bonus ball earned. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.11
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Bonus ball earned → all 4 indicators lit/animated.

requirements.title: 2.12 SpaceshipRamp (5k shot, ramp bonus, multiplier)
requirements.description: SpaceshipRamp: 5k per hit; every 5 ramp hits → multiplier +1 (max 6); ramp bonus 1M. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.12
requirements.acceptance_criteria: 5 ramp hits → multiplier +1; 25 hits → multiplier 6; round lost → multiplier 1.

requirements.title: 2.13 Android Acres rail
requirements.description: Rail in Android Acres (ball path/visual); layout/behavior only unless defined trigger. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.13
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Ball travels along rail; no regression to ramp or bumpers.

requirements.title: 2.14 Android bumpers A / B / COW (20k each)
requirements.description: Android bumpers A, B, COW; ball contact → 20,000 points each. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.14
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Hit each bumper → +20k.

requirements.title: 2.15 AndroidSpaceship target (200k + bonus)
requirements.description: AndroidSpaceship target + animatronic: ball enters → 200k + androidSpaceship bonus. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.15
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Ball enters AndroidSpaceship → +200k and bonusHistory contains androidSpaceship.

requirements.title: 2.16 ChromeDino mouth (200k + dinoChomp)
requirements.description: ChromeDino mouth sensor: ball enters → 200k + dinoChomp bonus. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.16
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Ball enters Dino mouth → +200k and dinoChomp in bonusHistory.

requirements.title: 2.17 DinoWalls (bonus ball spawn position)
requirements.description: DinoWalls area as bonus ball spawn position with impulse toward center. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.17
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Bonus ball spawns at DinoWalls with correct impulse.

requirements.title: 2.18 Dino slingshots (optional)
requirements.description: Slingshots in Dino Desert; behavior per design (kick back). Optional. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.18
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Ball hits slingshot → deflects as designed.

requirements.title: 2.19 Signpost (5k)
requirements.description: Signpost (Flutter Forest): ball contact → 5,000 points. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.19
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Ball hits signpost → +5k.

requirements.title: 2.20 Dash bumpers (main 200k, A/B 20k) and animatronic
requirements.description: Dash bumpers: main 200k; A and B 20k each; Dash animatronic. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.20
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Main Dash bumper → +200k; A or B → +20k each.

requirements.title: 2.21 Dash Nest bonus + bonus ball
requirements.description: All Dash bumpers lit → dashNest bonus + bonus ball logic (5s, DinoWalls). Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.21
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Light all Dash bumpers → dashNest; 5s later bonus ball spawns.

requirements.title: 2.22 Sparky bumpers A/B/C (20k) and animatronic
requirements.description: Sparky bumpers A, B, C: 20k each; Sparky animatronic. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.22
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Hit each Sparky bumper → +20k.

requirements.title: 2.23 Sparky computer (200k + sparkyTurboCharge)
requirements.description: Sparky computer target: ball enters → 200k + sparkyTurboCharge bonus. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.23
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Ball enters Sparky computer → +200k and sparkyTurboCharge in bonusHistory.

requirements.title: 2.24 Multiplier targets x2–x6 (visual)
requirements.description: Multiplier targets x2–x6 at fixed positions; visual indicators show current multiplier (lit 1..multiplier). Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.24
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Multiplier 3 → first 3 lit; multiplier 6 → all 6 lit.

requirements.title: 2.25 Bonus history display
requirements.description: Bonus history recorded and shown; all five bonuses (googleWord, dashNest, sparkyTurboCharge, dinoChomp, androidSpaceship). Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.25
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Trigger each bonus → bonusHistory contains it; UI shows list.

requirements.title: 2.26 Backbox: leaderboard and initials
requirements.description: Backbox: loading, leaderboard (top 10), initials form after game over; submit → store entry → game over info. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.26
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Game over → initials; submit → entry saved; leaderboard shows top 10.

requirements.title: 2.27 Backbox: share and mobile overlay
requirements.description: Share: copy score text or share URL. Optional mobile overlay for initials. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.27
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Share button → copy/share dialog.

requirements.title: 2.28 Bottom group: kickers (5k each)
requirements.description: Kickers left and right: ball contact → 5,000 points each. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.28
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Ball hits left/right kicker → +5k each.

requirements.title: 2.29 Launcher and input (I/O spec)
requirements.description: Launcher: ramp, flapper, plunger, rocket sprite; ball spawn at launcher. Input: Desktop keyboard; mobile: flippers + tap launch. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.29
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Round start → ball at launcher; Space/tap launches; input mapping per requirements.

requirements.title: 2.30 Polish and NFRs
requirements.description: 60 FPS target; input latency <100ms. Audio: bumper, kicker, rollover, drain, launch, bonus, multiplier. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.30
requirements.acceptance_criteria: FPS and latency acceptable; sounds on correct events.

requirements.title: 2.31 Player assets and persistence
requirements.description: Player assets (coins, upgrades, level progress) with persistence; user://player_assets.json; Classic and Level share. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.31
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Save → restart → load → same values; Classic and Level share asset instance.

requirements.title: 2.32 Main menu: Play, Levels, Store
requirements.description: Main menu (Splash): Play (Classic), Levels (Level Mode), Store. Post-game: optional Store from leaderboard. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.32
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Three options; each navigates correctly; back returns to menu.

requirements.title: 2.33 Coin earning (Classic)
requirements.description: Coins: rounds (100/round), bonuses (500/type), milestones (1k at 1M). Persisted. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.33
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Complete round → coins increase; hit bonus → coins; 1M → milestone; persist.

requirements.title: 2.34 Store scene and access
requirements.description: Store scene: main menu and after game over. Coin balance; item list. Back returns to Splash or Leaderboard. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.34
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Open Store → balance and list; Back returns correctly.

requirements.title: 2.35 Store: upgradable items and purchase
requirements.description: Upgradable items: Balls, Flippers, Plunger, Bumpers, Multiplier Boost, Extra Ball. Purchase with coins; persist. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.35
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Purchase → coins decrease, upgrade unlocked; restart → still unlocked.

requirements.title: 2.36 Store: character-themed upgrades
requirements.description: Character theme affects Store: themed upgrades (e.g. Dino-themed for Dino). Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.36
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Select Dino → Store shows Dino-themed items; purchase and use.

requirements.title: 2.37 Post-game coin grant and Score Range Board hook
requirements.description: Post-game: grant coins for round/bonus/milestone. Score Range Board can read score and bracket. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.37
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Finish game → coins updated; reload → persisted.

requirements.title: 2.38 Score Range Board
requirements.description: Score Range Board: brackets (0-100k, 100k-500k, etc.), rewards. New bracket notification; post-game grant. Progress bar. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.38
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Open board → brackets; new bracket → notification; reward coins; progress bar.

requirements.title: 2.39 Level Mode: entry and Level Select screen
requirements.description: Level Select: entry from Levels. Level list or world map; locked/unlocked. Select → start level. Back → menu. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.39
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Levels → Level Select; select level → proceeds; Back → menu.

requirements.title: 2.40 Level data and progression
requirements.description: Level data: id, layout, objectives, rewards. Complete N → unlock N+1. Progress persisted. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.40
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Complete level 1 → level 2 unlocked; restart → still unlocked.

requirements.title: 2.41 Level playfield (custom layout)
requirements.description: Level playfield: same physics; level-specific layout from level data. Example levels. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.41
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Level playfield matches layout; physics identical to Classic.

requirements.title: 2.42 Level objectives
requirements.description: Level objectives: target score, tasks (light letters, hit bumpers), time limit. Success → LevelComplete; fail → GameOver. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.42
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Reach 500k → level completes; hit all bumpers → completes; fail → game over.

requirements.title: 2.43 Level completion rewards
requirements.description: LevelComplete: grant coins and unlocks to player assets. Unlock next level. Persist. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.43
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Complete level → coins, next unlocked; Store same balance; restart → persisted.

requirements.title: 2.44 Level progress and high scores persistence
requirements.description: Level progress and per-level high scores saved. Level Select shows completed state and best score. Ref: FEATURE-STEPS 2.44
requirements.acceptance_criteria: Complete level → shows completed and score; beat score → updates and persists.

requirements.title: Hello World - Godot Snake Game Analysis
requirements.description: 分析并实现基于Godot的贪食蛇游戏

tasks.title: Hello World - Godot Snake Game Analysis
tasks.description: 分析基于Godot的贪食蛇游戏架构，拆解问题，制定实现计划
